creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
On March 13th new version of the Mozilla software will be released.
	We need some repocopies for the new ESR ports:
	www/firefox -> www/firefox-esr
	www/firefox-i18n -> www/firefox-esr-i18n
	mail/thunderbird -> mail/thunderbird-esr
	mail/thunderbird-i18n -> mail/thunderbird-esr-i18n
